title: Manufacturing Engineer - Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions:
Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions!
